preCommit.command: bash -c 'CLAUDE_VER=$(grep -oP "Current Version: v\K[0-9.]+" CLAUDE.md) && TS_VER=$(grep -oP "APP_VERSION.*\"\K[0-9.]+" src/config/version.ts) && if [ "$CLAUDE_VER" != "$TS_VER" ]; then echo "ERROR: CLAUDE.md ($CLAUDE_VER) != version.ts ($TS_VER)" && exit 1; else echo "Version check passed: $CLAUDE_VER"; fi'
